prompt: Minimalist group icon design: three overlapping circles in soft warm gradient colors (peach, coral, gold), with a tiny cute egg icon with subtle gold kintsugi cracks in the center intersection where all three circles meet. Clean white background. Modern, elegant, simple. Suitable for a messaging app group icon. Flat design, no 3D effects.
